input.question: What percentage of classrooms have projectors, grouped by building?

payload.question: What percentage of classrooms have projectors, grouped by building?

output.sql:
SELECT
  building AS building,
  COUNT(*) AS total_classrooms,
  SUM(CASE WHEN projector IS TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS classrooms_with_projectors,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN projector IS TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS percentage_with_projectors
FROM classrooms
GROUP BY building
ORDER BY percentage_with_projectors DESC;

visualization.title: Percentage of Classrooms with Projectors by Building

payload.sql:
SELECT
  building AS building,
  COUNT(*) AS total_classrooms,
  SUM(CASE WHEN projector IS TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS classrooms_with_projectors,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN projector IS TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS percentage_with_projectors
FROM classrooms
GROUP BY building
ORDER BY percentage_with_projectors DESC;
